ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Continued To Mar-07-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
H. Nathan James, Esq. for Plaintiff: Mazin Shatara, present, sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court orders the matter off calendar. Plaintiff to file an Amended Complaint to amend the prayer amount in the complaint.
